name_en: GUCCI New Wallet Arrivals, also usable as a wallet, is a practical design item promoted by the brand. The classic GG pattern is one of the iconic elements the brand started using in the 1930s, and after nearly a century of development, it still provides inspiration for the brand to explore new expressions.
name_cn:
GUCCI New Wallet Arrivals, also usable as a wallet, is a practical design item promoted by the brand. The classic GG pattern is one of the iconic elements the brand started using in the 1930s, and after nearly a century of development, it still provides inspiration for the brand to explore new expressions.
Style: 597606
Size: 11cm x 10cm x 1.5cm
Color: Khaki
